name: Bran Muffins 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oil and sugar thoroughly in a VERY LARGE bowl.
2. Add egg substitute, 2 ounces at a time, and beat well.
3. Mix together All Bran and 100 percent bran.
4. Add boiling water to the bran mixture and stir until cool.
5. Add buttermilk and vanilla to the bran mixture.
6. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt (if using).
7. Add the bran mixture to the creamed mixture, alternating with the sifted dry ingredients in three portions.
8. Stir thoroughly to blend all ingredients.
9. If storing batter, store it in a tightly covered container in the refrigerator. It will keep up to 3 months.
10. When using stored batter, do not stir it before filling muffin cups.
11. To bake muffins, fill paper muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
12. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until done.
13. Sprinkle dates, nuts, raisins, or glazed fruit on top of the batter when filling muffin cups; this will add a sweet filling inside the muffins.
14. Muffins are very good cold and may be reheated or frozen after baking.
